verified.notes: Program has two distinct tracks: HCAP (Home Care Assistance Program) for adults 18–59 with disabilities, and Home Care Program for adults 60+. Search results confirm minimum age (18) and primary application phone for HCAP. No authoritative URL with current 2026 income/asset thresholds was found in search results.

verified.notes: SCO is a dual Medicare-Medicaid plan; eligibility is based on Medicare Parts A & B enrollment, MassHealth Standard qualification, and residency in a served area—not on income or asset limits. Income and asset limits are determined by MassHealth Standard eligibility, not SCO itself. Phone number (800-AGE-INFO) directs to Aging Services Access Points for local assistance; no dedicated SCO application line found in official sources. As of January 1, 2026, all SCO enrollees must maintain both Medicare Parts A and B and MassHealth Standard enrollment.

programs.notes: SCO is a dual Medicare-Medicaid plan; eligibility is based on Medicare Parts A & B enrollment, MassHealth Standard qualification, and residency in a served area—not on income or asset limits. Income and asset limits are determined by MassHealth Standard eligibility, not SCO itself. Phone number (800-AGE-INFO) directs to Aging Services Access Points for local assistance; no dedicated SCO application line found in official sources. As of January 1, 2026, all SCO enrollees must maintain both Medicare Parts A and B and MassHealth Standard enrollment.
